targets.query:
from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "quality_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "result")
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_ai")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "defect_detected")
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_ai")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "inference_ms")
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "quality_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "result")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_ai")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "confidence")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_ai")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "defect_detected")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "manual_reading")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature" or r._field == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "quality_check" or r._measurement == "vision_ai" or r._measurement == "manual_reading" or r._measurement == "production")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["_measurement", "_field", "_value", "_time"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
